jobs.name: Execution Health Check
jobs.prompt: Analyze execution health check. Report API status, position count, open orders. If API is down, flag CRITICAL. If new unknown positions appear, flag ALERT. If healthy, respond with [SILENT].
jobs.last_error: ValueError: Model execution-default has a context window of 32,768 tokens, which is below the minimum 64,000 required by Hermes Agent.  Choose a model with at least 64K context, or set model.context_length in config.yaml to override.

jobs.name: Position Stop Guard
jobs.prompt: Analyze position stop guard. Report any naked/unknown positions immediately. Check if stop levels are being respected. If all positions match risk plan, respond with [SILENT]. If any position is unprotected or unknown, flag it LOUD.
jobs.last_error: ValueError: Model execution-default has a context window of 32,768 tokens, which is below the minimum 64,000 required by Hermes Agent.  Choose a model with at least 64K context, or set model.context_length in config.yaml to override.
